Tenways is currently offering two flash sale windows for its e-bikes, which will be ending within 27 hours at the time of writing this, giving you some time to jump on up to $766 in increased savings from the sale that started at the top of the month. The most notable of the two offers is Tenways’ newest Wayfarer Premium Cruiser e-bike with $366 in FREE gear at $1,799 shipped in both colorways. Since it was released back in October with a $2,199 tag, this e-bike has been included in sales with a $277 bundle (made up of a kickstand, rear cargo rack, and mudguards) that now has an additional large pannier bag ($89 value) included, which we’ve previously seen only cut down as low as $1,899. Now, during this flash sale, you’re getting a larger-than-ever combined $766 savings that lands it down at a new all-time low price. Additionally, you can find Tenways’ CGO800S Premium Step-Thru Commuter e-bike with a $277 bundle of FREE gear cut down to its second-lowest price of $1,799 shipped for the Pebble Grey and Sky Blue colorways.
